query:
-- Check if these [Template] conversations have any messages in wa_messages
SELECT wc.id, wc.remoteJid, wc.sessionId, wc.lastMessagePreview, wc.lastMessageAt,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.waConversationId = wc.id) AS msg_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid) AS msg_count_by_jid
FROM wa_conversations wc
WHERE wc.lastMessagePreview LIKE '%Template%'
LIMIT 5;
